calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jamieson Fong appeared via zoom for Jon Stevens (petitioner).

Mr. Fong stated that his client is handling internal affairs, that he is requesting a continuance. The matter is continued to August 19, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jamieson Fong for executor Jon Stevens (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Petition for Final Distribution; and 2) Order to Show Cause.

The Court addressed counsel's failure to appear at the prior hearing. Mr. Fong explained that he had mistakenly calendared the matter for a different date.

The Court inquired why an amended petition had not yet been filed. Mr. Fong reported that he had submitted additional supporting documentation but had not filed an amended petition. He stated that he would file an amended petition including the information required by the tentative ruling and requested 45 days to do so.

The Court continued the matter to June 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court declined to impose sanctions for counsel's prior failure to appear.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Jamieson Kenneth Fong (attorney) to appear on March 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on filing of a final distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge:Cindee Mayfield. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Payment Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A second order to show cause will be issued to Attorney Jamieson K. Fong to appear on November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to show why further sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to file proof of payment of sanctions and for failure to follow the court order. The status hearing on payment of sanctions is also continued to November 18, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Mar-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jamieson Fong appeared via zoom for Jon Stevens (petitioner).

Mr. Fong stated that he will send a check to pay as soon as possible to pay off the sanctions, that they are just waiting to get the home ready for sale. The matter is continued to March 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on payment of sanctions is set for October 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Sep-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Continued To Aug-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jamieson Fong appeared by zoom for and with Jon Stevens by zoom.

Mr. Fong stated that his non-appearance at the last hearing was due to mis-calendaring of the hearing, that he thought the hearing was this month and that it was completely his mistake. The court does not find good cause. The court orders sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Mr. Fong which are payable within 10 days. With respect to the inventory, Mr. Fong stated that he finally received a list of the items yesterday. Mr. Fong also stated that the daughter is out of custody, that she is in a facility and in a good place right now, that she is now in a state of mind where she is engaged, and that they are creating a trust on her behalf to receive her 50% interest in the property. In addition, Mr. Fong stated that they will need to list and sell the property, that he will have to file a petition for approval of a status report and that no one is living in the house. The order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to August 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jon Stevens and the Attorney Jamieson K. Fong to appear on July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for counsel to appear on July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear under CCP 128. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jamieson Fong appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Fong stated that his client has just received the letters this past week, that the administrator is dealing with the decedent's daughter who is out of State and in custody, and that they are working on getting a custodial trust in place for the daughter. Mr. Fong also stated that there are only two known debts, that there is a house in which the daughter is 50% owner, and that the daughter is doing better and receiving some help. The court reminded Mr. Fong that an inventory and appraisal is needed. Status on close of estate is continued to June 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court advised counsel that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration pursuant to Probate Code 12200 needs to be filed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To May-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Jamieson Fong, Esq., for Jon Stevens, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel reports on the status of the estate. The court reminds counsel that Letters have not issued.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to May-06-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration, prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 10/23/16 is admitted to probate. Jon Stevens is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for February 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.
